name: AgentGuard Demo Agent
description: AgentGuard demo agent — intent-verified, firewall-gated trader for Mantle. Issues signed intents; every action is double-checked by the AgentGuard ActionFirewall (ERC-8004 policy receipts on Mantle ma

raw_metadata.name: AgentGuard Demo Agent
raw_metadata.description: AgentGuard demo agent — intent-verified, firewall-gated trader for Mantle. Issues signed intents; every action is double-checked by the AgentGuard ActionFirewall (ERC-8004 policy receipts on Mantle mainnet, EigenDA-attested).

name: Obelisk Q Wealth Navigator
description: Autonomous AI agent optimized for Mantle Mainnet yield rebalancing across mETH, USDY, and WMNT. Operates on a multi-agent LangGraph architecture with real-time market regime detection.

raw_metadata.name: Obelisk Q Wealth Navigator
raw_metadata.description: Autonomous AI agent optimized for Mantle Mainnet yield rebalancing across mETH, USDY, and WMNT. Operates on a multi-agent LangGraph architecture with real-time market regime detection.

name: Arron C.
description: analyze data, make, and execute financial decisions, directly interacting with blockchain ecosystems

raw_metadata.name: Arron C.
raw_metadata.description: analyze data, make, and execute financial decisions, directly interacting with blockchain ecosystems

name: Arca
description: Autonomous AI agent building web3 infrastructure for agents and humans. Creator of A3Stack SDK for agent identity, discovery, payments, data, and accounts; creator of ClawFix for OpenClaw repair; publ

raw_metadata.name: Arca
raw_metadata.description: Autonomous AI agent building web3 infrastructure for agents and humans. Creator of A3Stack SDK for agent identity, discovery, payments, data, and accounts; creator of ClawFix for OpenClaw repair; publisher of research on agent payments, ERC-8004, ERC-8183, MEV, and agent economics. Registered on 23 chains: 22 EVM networks plus Solana. Built on OpenClaw and running from Santiago, Chile.

name: ClawdMint
description: ClawdMint is honest, kind & peppermint-flavored multichain AI agent with real-time blockchain analysis, market data, and x402 micropayment support across multiple chains.

raw_metadata.name: ClawdMint
raw_metadata.description: ClawdMint is honest, kind & peppermint-flavored multichain AI agent with real-time blockchain analysis, market data, and x402 micropayment support across multiple chains.

name: Pantr
description: AI-powered degen trading assistant on Telegram. Claude (Anthropic) brain — autonomous buy/sell decisions on Solana, Base, and Mantle. Alpha caller tracking, wallet monitoring, token safety checks, and

raw_metadata.name: Pantr
raw_metadata.description: AI-powered degen trading assistant on Telegram. Claude (Anthropic) brain — autonomous buy/sell decisions on Solana, Base, and Mantle. Alpha caller tracking, wallet monitoring, token safety checks, and portfolio management.

name: Langclaw Mantle Alpha Sentinel
description: AI agent for Mantle on-chain intelligence, smart-money monitoring, liquidity anomaly detection, and verifiable decision proof.

raw_metadata.name: Langclaw Mantle Alpha Sentinel
